---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or a change to existing behavior
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

<!--
What are you trying to do that qdo can't do well today?
Describe the friction concretely — a real workflow you hit, not a hypothetical.
-->

## What you'd want

<!-- What would the feature look like? Sketch the command, flag, output, or behavior. -->

```bash
qdo ...
```

## Why it belongs in qdo

<!--
qdo is a focused tool (see DIFFERENTIATION.md). Check one or more:

- [ ] Tightens the compounding loop (discover → understand → capture → answer → hand off)
- [ ] Closes a gap an agent consuming `-f json` output would hit
- [ ] Covers a backend-specific capability where qdo goes deep (Snowflake, DuckDB)
- [ ] Improves first-contact experience (README / tutorial / SKILL)
- [ ] Something else — say why

If the feature would pull qdo toward being qsv / datasette / visidata / an in-product NL-to-SQL
assistant, read DIFFERENTIATION.md "What qdo deliberately isn't" first — those directions are
rejected by design.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any existing command, workflow, or ecosystem tool that partially solves this, and why it's not enough. -->

## Would you be willing to help build it?

- [ ] Yes, happy to open a PR
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No — just filing the idea
